hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && npm test --passWithNoTests 2>/dev/null || true; }

tmp=$(mktemp); cat > "$tmp"; cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' < "$tmp"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'npm (test|run test)'; then if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then tp=$(jq -r '.transcript_path // ""' < "$tmp"); msg=""; if [ -n "$tp" ] && [ -f "$tp" ]; then msg=$(grep -a '"type":"user"' "$tp" | jq -r '.message.content | if type=="array" then (map(select(.type=="text")) | first | .text) else . end' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^null$' | tail -1 | tr -s '\n\r\t ' ' ' | sed 's/^ //;s/ $//' | cut -c1-72); fi; [ -z "$msg" ] && msg="chore: auto-commit after tests"; git add -A && git commit -m "$msg" && printf '{"systemMessage":"✔ %s"}\n' "$msg"; else echo '{"systemMessage":"✔ Tests passed — nothing to commit"}'; fi; fi; rm -f "$tmp"
